headers.description: Request headers (lowercased keys per Fetch standard). Host MAY strip sensitive headers (authorization, x-*-secret) before exposure.

query.description: Parsed query string. Array values for repeated keys.

body.description: Request body. Parsed as JSON when Content-Type is application/json; raw string otherwise; null for empty body.

remoteAddr.description: Client IP per the host's trust-proxy config.

receivedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the host received the request.
